title: Implement DODAG visualization for simulation harness
description: Add visualization capabilities to show DODAG formation and routing paths in the simulation. Should provide methods to track and visualize the routing tree structure as it evolves during simulation.
close_reason: Implemented in rpl/visualize.py: to_dot (Graphviz, child->parent edges, root doublecircle, optional ranks), to_ascii (indented tree, cycle-safe), topology_from_states/ranks_from_states (extract from DodagState), format_source_route. Headless/serializable, pure functions over a DODAG snapshot. 6 tests. ruff clean.
